Title: Ketchaku da!! Honô no keshin 20-ban Kaiô Ken no Kamehameha
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Plot: Goku loses hope as he is thrashed by Frieza, and he must rely on his love for his friends and family to summon enough strength to rebound. Meanwhile, Gohan must find a way to return Bulma to her own body.
